name: Tinta Link
tagline: Link-in-bio platform for the wine industry
description: A Linktree-style link-in-bio tool built for the wine ecosystem. Users create a unique handle and customize their public profile with social media links, website URLs, and a bio. Features drag-and-drop link reordering, profile image uploads, and an admin panel for managing users and configurable social networks.
highlights: Public profile pages with unique handles and customizable bio
Admin panel with user management and configurable social networks
Google OAuth and email magic-link authentication
